exercises.name: Bending the knee with support while sitting
steps: Sit upright on a chair, keeping your back straight.
Keep your foot on a support like a footrest or the ground.
Bend your knee by pulling your heel backward slowly to activate hamstrings.
Return slowly to the starting position.

exercises.name: Lift the extended leg
steps: Lie on your back on a firm, flat surface.
Bend one knee and place that foot flat on the ground.
Keep the other leg straight and tighten the thigh muscles.
Slowly lift the straight leg to the height of the bent knee.
Hold for a few seconds, then lower slowly with control.

exercises.name: Bending the knee with bed support
exercises.image: assets/images/Bending knee with bed support supine.png
steps: Lie on your back on a bed or flat surface.
Place a pillow or rolled towel under your knee.
Slowly bend your knee, bringing your heel toward your buttocks.
Hold for a few seconds, then return to starting position.

exercises.name: Bending the knee without support while sitting
exercises.image: assets/images/Bending the knee without support while sitting.png
steps: Sit upright on a stable chair or bench with your back straight.
Slowly lift one leg until your knee is almost fully extended, without letting it rest on anything.
Lower the leg back down slowly to the starting position.

exercises.name: Shoulder flexion
steps: Stand or sit upright with your back straight.
Raise your arm forward and upward while keeping it straight.
Lift as high as comfortable without pain.
Lower slowly back to the starting position.

exercises.name: Horizontal weighted openings
steps: Sit or stand upright holding a light weight.
Raise your arm to the side at shoulder height.
Slowly open and close your arm horizontally like a door.
Lower slowly to the starting position.

exercises.name: External rotation of shoulders with elastic band
exercises.image: assets/images/External rotation of shoulders with elastic band.png
steps: Hold an elastic band with both hands, elbows bent at 90 degrees.
Pull your hand outward, rotating the shoulder.
Return slowly to the starting position.

exercises.name: Circular pendulum
steps: Lean forward with one hand supported on a table.
Let your other arm hang relaxed.
Move the arm in small circular motions clockwise and counterclockwise.
Continue for 20-30 seconds.
